entities.name: PIGEONPEA
entities.description: A legume crop used to develop CMS-based hybrids for quality analysis

entities.name: COOKING TIME
entities.description: The time required for pigeonpea dal to cook, measured in minutes

entities.name: WATER ABSORPTION
entities.description: The amount of water absorbed by pigeonpea dal during cooking, measured in gg"

entities.name: DAL RECOVERY
entities.description: The percentage of dal recovered after processing

entities.name: PROTEIN CONTENT
entities.description: The percentage of protein present in the pigeonpea dal

entities.name: ANALYSIS OF VARIANCE
entities.description: A statistical method used to determine if there are significant differences between the means of the quality traits

entities.name: CROSSING
entities.description: The process of breeding CMS-lines with testers to produce F1 hybrids

entities.name: CMS-LINES
entities.description: Cytoplasmic Male Sterile lines used as female parents in hybrid production
